title: FDA Regulatory Agent Output
description: Structured JSON the regulatory specialist agent emits for one fda_regulatory_events row. Validated by modal_workers/shared/fda_agent_validator.py before any DB write.

adcom_risk_score.description: 1=low risk (no AdCom planned, or AdCom historically aligned with sponsor) ... 5=high risk (split AdCom on similar drugs, vocal critics on panel).

crl_precedent.description: Has the FDA issued a CRL on this drug or a closely-related precursor?

resubmission_pathway.description: If a CRL did or could occur, agent's read on resubmission viability.

staff_review_redflags.description: Short phrases summarizing concerns surfaced in FDA briefing books, AdCom transcripts, or Federal Register notices.

evidence_confidence_boost.description: Signed additive boost to evidence_confidence. Bounded ±0.40 by the validator.

regulatory_confidence.description: Agent's self-assessed confidence in the regulatory analysis itself.
